items.name: Gothic Elegant 3D Dress Black Skirt White Blouse
items.description:
This 3D gothic dress features a long black skirt with realistic movement and a white blouse with high neck and long sleeves complete with black bow tie perfect for dark academia style in Roblox

Ideal for roleplay games like Brookhaven and Bloxburg this Victorian inspired outfit combines classic elegance with modern Roblox fashion

The set includes black floor length skirt with elegant ruffles white oversized blouse with puff sleeves and adjustable black bow tie all designed with high quality textures and no clipping issues

Compatible with R15 and Rthro avatars this versatile outfit works for both everyday wear and special roleplay occasions

Perfect for fans of gothic fashion Wednesday Addams inspired looks or dark academia aesthetics

Search terms gothic dress Roblox 3D black skirt outfit dark academia clothes Victorian style avatar elegant gothic fashion Wednesday Addams inspired outfit roleplay costume Brookhaven aesthetic outfit
